name: Zootia Harvest Measures Board
summary: Institution tracking measures, yields, and standards for Zootia’s raw-material economy.
day_to_day: Records crop totals, herd counts, and outgoing material standards.
who_works_there: Measurers, record clerks, livestock assessors, granary agents.
who_uses_it: Farmers, herders, merchants, neighboring houses dependent on Zootia output.
authority: Can certify measures and influence distribution priorities or disputes.
public_manifestation: Weights, ledgers, granary inspections, counting yards.
conflict_or_bottleneck: When prices rise, trust in measurements becomes politically explosive.
